channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Live updates: bitcoin falls below $62,000 ahead of jobs data as Zcash bug rocks crypto
item.description: Zcash plummeted 40% after Shielded Labs revealed a major bug that went undetected for 4 years.

item.title: Arthur Hayes dumps zcash holdings after Orchard Pool vulnerability revealed
item.description: Hayes said he would reconsider his stance if his assumptions that an exploit is still possible prove to be incorrect.

item.title: Pump.fun's Latest Experiment Is Already Getting Weird
item.description: Pump.fun's GO bounty platform already has hundreds of listings following its pitch to let users “Pay ANYONE to do ANYTHING.”

item.title: Bitcoin sentiment hit peak bearishness at recent lows, peak bullishness near tops
item.description: Your day-ahead look for June 5, 2026

item.title: IntroductionBitcoin is no longer a narrow technical experiment or a niche monetary protest. It has become the dominant digital monetary network and a global asset with profound implications for individuals, institutions, corporations, banks, capital markets, and - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE9nZ1UyNFgyTXBNNzVLa2ptMGpwanBBQlByZUJHeFExTTBvdU44LU1wNXpRVi1WOXFCRHNpaXpnUGZJM0hCUmFURGhYekhnX05sSFpqWG5PS1RILU0?oc=5" target="_blank">IntroductionBitcoin is no longer a narrow t…

item.title: Forward Industries moves $32M in SOL amid $1B paper loss
item.description: Forward Industries moved $31.9 million in SOL to Coinbase Prime as its Solana bet sits over 70% underwater, underscoring growing strain on corporate crypto treasuries.

item.title: South Korea police probe Polymarket users over illegal gambling claims: Report
item.description: South Korean police reportedly launched the country’s first illegal gambling probe into local Polymarket users amid election-betting scrutiny.

item.title: ZEC Crashes 38% as Zcash Discloses ‘Critical Counterfeiting Vulnerability’
item.description: An Orchard vulnerability that allowed undetectable counterfeiting of ZEC in its shielded pool has reignited debate over privacy coins.

item.title: Crypto's worst week since July 2024 deepens as bitcoin, ether near critical price levels
item.description: Crypto is on course for its worst week since July 2024, with the ether price approaching a critical support as a zcash exploit and AI capital rotation pile on the pressure.

item.title: JPMorgan, Bank of America, Citi to start blockchain offensive with shared tokenized network
item.description: American's biggest banks plan to introduce a shared tokenized network next year to tackle the potential threat of stablecoins eating into their deposits.

item.title: U.S. bitcoin, ether ETFs end record multibillion outflow streak
item.description: U.S. spot bitcoin ETFs pulled in a net $3.05 million on Thursday, capping 13 straight sessions of outflows totaling roughly $4.4 billion. Ether ETFs ended a 17-day outflow streak.

item.title: for any bitcoin maxi shitting on zcash, let me remind you of the transaction (block 74638) that created 184,467,440,737.09551616 BTC due to an overflow bug. zcash has one of the best security & cryptography people. what happened is some serious shit, ther - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE9rSDdCYXVHdEZQQy0zSGo2eVBDcDhNek5KNzNSbkFpd0dXS2xkMmV0ZG1pa1Q2Rk4zWXBIMmFoa0FGN2d0VWFmZ0JtT3dPVWoyX1dNbjFvVEYzTW1iQnRvYVZfRQ?oc=5" target="_blank">for any bitcoin maxi shitting on…

item.title: Here's what could happen if bitcoin breaks below $60,000
item.description: A confluence of factors makes $60,000 as key level to watch for in the near term, according to Deribit.

item.title: Crypto billionaires bankroll Nigel Farage's pro-crypto party
item.description: Tether-linked billionaire Christopher Harborne and BitMEX co-founder Ben Delo donated $9.4 million to Nigel Farage’s Reform UK in the first quarter.

item.title: Strategy’s leveraged Bitcoin model has faced its first stress test: Grayscale
item.description: “Less Bitcoin on levered DAT balance sheets and more on diversified corporate balance sheets will be a positive,” said Grayscale’s head of research, Zach Pandl.

item.title: BREAKING 🚨: Bitcoin $BTC Timberrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrr📉📉 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTFB2emIwWllzbFFCYW9mLUlTQUtnZ05yODVfTDcwb19LQW1KdzhqU29JQmdkdk4ybnEweGhDRnJXcFlXZzhVbTJvclU0UVFlcWpTMlg1OFZsZWo4WUhRUVE?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING 🚨: Bitcoin $BTC Timberrrrrrrr…

item.title: #PeckShieldAlert An Ethereum MEV bot just accidentally tipped a random user 167 $ETH (worth ~$300K) - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE1vSkVGbTNSeEZOWVhqb0JETFRpd19QcDZGSHRGU1I3RWdNRzdOWG9ybEVCUGhHT0NvUGJ3MjhOWVhwbHZlOEhQRDZDSWtBc1FhdVlqaU4yTkk4RTFLYzlOSkoxRmRLYlk?oc=5" target="_blank">#PeckShieldAlert An Ethereu…

item.title: Bitcoin in danger of dropping to $60,000, with Zcash bulls turning their backs on ZEC
item.description: AI bets are recording rapid profit-taking as Broadcom as outlook for AI-chip sales fell short of high expectations, driving down crypto markets.

item.title: Bitcoin plunges to near $62,000 as the AI trade unwinds, HYPE falls 14%
item.description: Broadcom's disappointing AI chip outlook pulled the Nasdaq lower for a third session, dragged Asian equities down with it, and took crypto along for the ride.

item.title: Anthropic says self-improving AI may be closer than expected
item.description: Companies have been developing AI very quickly to stay ahead of the market, but Favaro and Clark argue that a slowdown would allow more time to deal with the technology’s implications.

item.title: Zcash plummets 38% as Shielded Labs reveals a major bug that went undetected for four years
item.description: Shielded Labs revealed that the bug could have helped an attacker print unlimited counterfeit tokens. That could have damaged trust in the token's supply and its value.

item.title: ZEC drops 30% as Shielded Labs reveals more about infinite counterfeit bug
item.description: ZEC market capitalization fell by almost $3 billion over the past 24 hours following the disclosure of a critical vulnerability, despite it being patched already.

item.title: Senate Republicans push finance watchdogs to clarify crypto capital rules
item.description: Senator Cynthia Lummis has led a group of lawmakers urging financial regulators for “fair capital treatment for on-balance sheet treatment of digital assets.”

item.title: BREAKING : 🇺🇸Blackrock ETF has bought $47,300,000 worth of Bitcoin. After 13 straight days of selling, the fund is back to buying. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE80ek5ndjhYbHZIOGFyVXBRM2FxSERLbENoTkxjeU1LMUotQld3ZHhpUDdDdC04WFd3NTR4dF8xc2JRNzc0bEFBanlTd2EteXoxZVJyWVVwY2doaU43bDY4?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING : 🇺🇸Blackrock ETF has bough…

item.title: Solana Ecosystem Roundup: May 2026
item.description: Solana Ecosystem Roundup May 2026: RWA ATH at $2.8B+, 97% tokenized equities share, $16.4B stablecoin supply, and record ETF inflows.

item.title: Comptroller says only Democrats pressuring over crypto trust charter
item.description: US Comptroller of the Currency Jonathan Gould and New York Representative Gregory Meeks sparred over Donald Trump’s influence on regulators he has nominated as president at a Thursday oversight hearing.

item.title: AI Is Already Developing AI, Says Anthropic—And Humans May Be Slowing Things Down
item.description: Anthropic says AI now writes most of its code and runs increasingly complex research tasks, leaving people to decide which problems are worth solving.

item.title: Republican Lawmaker Plans to Add Prediction Markets to Congressional Stock Ban Bill
item.description: Rep. Bryan Steil said he'll add language to the House congressional stock ban bill to cover prediction markets like Polymarket and Kalshi.

item.title: Bitcoin fell 21% after Strategy’s debt buyback news: Is Terra Luna-style doom loop next?
item.description: Bitcoin price collapsed as Strategy faced tighter liquidity conditions and paused its BTC buying. Is it time to jump ship or buy the dip?

item.title: Russia targets British 17-year-old for alleging digital assets were skirting sanctions
item.description: Political activist Bill Browder, the teenager’s father, said his son was “the first high school student in the world to be sanctioned by an authoritarian regime” over a report on the ruble-pegged stablecoin A7A5.

item.title: 'Looksmaxxing' Trend Spawns $100M Gray Market Fueled By Bitcoin, Stablecoins: Chainalysis
item.description: Demand for peptides fueled by the "looksmaxxing" trend has spawned a $100 million gray market paid for primarily with crypto.

item.title: Professional investors dumped 52K BTC worth of ETFs in Q1, filings show
item.description: US spot Bitcoin ETF ownership shifted during the market downturn as hedge funds exited positions, while banks and long-term allocators continued building exposure.

item.title: Crypto Clarity Act in spotlight for bad-actor provisions as Senate process grinds forward
item.description: The industry has been trying to make a case this week the Clarity Act provides law enforcement strong tools to combat illicit finance involving cryptocurrency.

item.title: Google DeepMind CEO Says AGI Is Coming Fast: 'We Don't Have Long to Prepare'
item.description: The Nobel Prize-winning AI researcher says humanity is standing in the "foothills of the singularity."

item.title: Coinbase to launch token-backed mortgage down payments this summer
item.description: A Coinbase-Better Home & Finance initiative will allow qualified borrowers to use Bitcoin and USDC as collateral for home loan down payments.

item.title: OCC chief says Democrats applying sole political pressure in World Liberty charter choice
item.description: The regulator rejected claims he's doing President Trump's bidding during a congressional hearing that also addressed the GENIUS Act stablecoin push.

item.title: 'Dr. Doom'-backed Atlas Capital CEO says bitcoin could crash 70% before reaching $500,000
item.description: Backed by economist Nouriel Roubini, a long-time anti-bitcoin advocate, and known as 'Dr. Doom,' the Atlas CEO, Reza Bundy, shot a short-term warning for bitcoin but stayed bullish in the long-term.

item.title: The Ethereum not ETH stuff is the mental fallacy that triggered me into writing and podcasting in the first place. There is no strong Ethereum without an ETH worth trillions. Without ETH as a global store of value, Ethereum is a failed project. Full stop. ETH is eco - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTFBEaGVqa3J1TzVkRjF6WFVxN2diM0FoVmd0QWhBU0kxTVA4SEdnRFVPX1MzczRfOExkNXZIb1BIckRmS1A5aEpHcjVQTE5sTnZ2V1hQUUloYVlJczQ2OTJWNg?oc=5" target="_blank">The Ethereum not ETH stuff is the me…

item.title: Strategy's Michael Saylor Blames 'Capital Rotation' Into AI as Bitcoin Dives 13%
item.description: With Bitcoin falling hard this week and down nearly 50% from peak. Strategy's Michael Saylor is pointing the finger at the AI boom.

item.title: Bitcoin bulls' fate rests on $60K support as crypto erases $2T in market cap
item.description: Bitcoin continued "incredible" 2022 bear market repeat behavior as sellers kept control over BTC price rebound attempts.

item.title: Bybit joins Western Union’s new USDPT network as stablecoin expands distribution
item.description: The exchange integration gives Western Union’s dollar-pegged token access to crypto market liquidity as payment providers accelerate their adoption of stablecoins.

item.title: Crypto Billionaires Donate $9.4M to Farage’s Reform UK in Q1
item.description: Tether investor Christopher Harborne and BitMEX co-founder Ben Delo’s outspent Britain's traditional political donors.

item.title: Bitcoin Miners Emerge as 'Power Landlords' of AI Boom—And Revenue Will Surge: Bernstein
item.description: Bernstein is bullish on Bitcoin miners as they increasingly power the AI boom, assigning “Outperform” ratings to TeraWulf and Cipher Digital.

item.title: Who murdered Bitcoin? - x.com
item.description: Who murdered Bitcoin?

item.title: Hyperliquid pulls back from record highs as Arthur Hayes exits position shy of $150 price target
item.description: The crypto veteran blamed macro risks and AI mania for taking profits, drawing backlash from traders for selling well below his recent bullish forecasts.

item.title: DOJ Task Force Freezes $3.8M in Illicit Crypto—With Help From Coinbase, SpaceX and Meta
item.description: Some of America's biggest companies helped squash crypto fraud stemming from organized crime in Southeast Asia.

item.title: Fannie Mae-Backed Bitcoin Home Mortgages Are Finally Here, Coinbase Says
item.description: Coinbase said a Michigan couple closed on the first-ever conventional, Fannie Mae-backed home mortgage by pledging Bitcoin as collateral.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Crypto for Advisors: The crypto due diligence questions you forgot to ask
item.description: As stablecoins, shifting regulation and AI-enabled infrastructure mature, advisors should revisit three questions their crypto due diligence may no longer fully cover.

item.title: Saylor downplays Bitcoin slide as Strategy faces $11B paper loss
item.description: Strategy’s Bitcoin paper loss tops $11 billion as Saylor pointed to ETF outflows and AI infrastructure spending as factors pressuring BTC.

item.title: Why tokenization is an ETF-style market structure revolution
item.description: The current tokenization dialogue and pattern resemble ETFs’ early days, which ultimately transformed into a $10+ trillion market, Lie argues.

item.title: British Teen Sanctioned By Russia After Alleging Crypto Use to Evade Sanctions
item.description: The teenager's research into Russia’s alleged illicit crypto flows appears to have prompted Moscow's retaliation.

item.title: The crypto markets are falling apart, as $BTC prints new lows and everyone questions the thesis. $SUI had three outages in a few days. $ETH is going down in value. The best moment to be recording podcasts with these two leaders: Kostas Chalkias and Tom - x.com

item.title: BREAKING: The first Federal National Mortgage Association-backed mortgage using Bitcoin in the US just closed using Coinbase 🇺🇸 The homebuyer said: “We closed on our home and my Bitcoin stayed intact. We didn’t have to liquidate, didn’t have to time th - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFBDbW9mbTAyQV8tMXdBWG51NzQxaDZQSVp3VEhRUlQ3NG41ekluLWJfUVNzdVlQR2lhckszcXNlbEZfWnc3R1BjM25CU2tXdkd0TUdfblExR1IxbWljVVp5R1Noa2RIVm8?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: The first Federal…

item.title: Not all Ethereum layer 2s are dying, but many general-purpose chains no longer have a reason to exist
item.description: In this week's edition of The Protocol Newsletter, we're looking at the state of the Ethereum layer-2 ecosystem.

item.title: No one has ever had worse timing with crypto than me #DDTG - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFBuNGhDU21IS3dxVThqdkJFTzFFQTZhb2tXd3JJN25YT0s3WXlMNDRsbC1uNUtVQTdMdmN5b1Fna3k2RU9XLW04S0VoelFyZkFhMVNaTC1oTHU0WnZ6a3JzWFg1NVpWM1U?oc=5" target="_blank">No one has ever had worse t…

item.title: Tom Lee’s $250,000 ether target: Here’s what math says about this crazy prediction
item.description: Bitmine's chairman told a Paris conference ether would 50x from here on AI and corporate validators. Here's how supply schedule, the ETH-to-bitcoin ratio history and the actual breakdown of staked ether look at those levels.

item.title: Apex, Archax join Goldman Sachs tokenized real estate fund project
item.description: Apex Group is providing fund services for a tokenized real estate fund using Goldman Sachs’ GS DAP platform.

item.title: Ripple-linked XRP sinks 7% to four-month lows
item.description: XRP fell another 7% after losing key support levels, with traders weighing growing institutional demand against one of the token's weakest technical setups in months.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Bitcoin Cash (BCH), up 1.5%, is only gainer
item.description: NEAR Protocol (NEAR) declined 15.2% and Internet Computer (ICP) dropped 13.1%, leading the index lower.
